|desc=Brock's {{p|Graveler}} was first seen as he watched Red battle the Trainers in the [[Pewter Gym]]. Later on, Brock gave him to {{adv|Yellow}}, who named him Gravvy. He has since evolved it into a {{p|Golem}}.
